name: Airtificial Intelligence Structures, S.A.
summary: Airtificial Intelligence Structures, S.A., an engineering and consulting company, focuses on the integrated management of various projects worldwide. The company provides services at various stages of the integrated project cycle, such as strategic planning and investment programming, preliminary feasibility and viability studies, permitting, project conception and design, contractor management, work management and supervision, operation and maintenance management of constructed projects, quality control and validation of results, and turnkey projects. It serves water engineering, environment, geology, transport infrastructure, agronomy, energy and industry, integrated project management, private sector development, education and healthcare, technological development, property ownership and land registry, territorial planning, and service management sectors. Airtificial Intelligence Structures, S.A. was founded in 1970 and is based in Madrid, Spain.
